problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
